ValidationRule.description: OBJECTIF : Ready to Execute : Risk Team = Oui // Finance Team = Oui // Tax DAC6 = Oui // SPC != Oui to-do // New Entities != Null
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND (
RecordType.Name = "IS Agreement", NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Ready to execute"),
OR( (Risk_Team__c=false), (Finances__c=false), (Tax_DAC6__c=false), AND(ISPICKVAL(New_Entities__c, "Yes"), NOT(KYD_DD_Oversight_Status__c = "Completed"))
))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To proceed to "Ready to execute" stage, the following criteria need to be met : Risk Team, Finance Team, Tax DAC6 must be checked. If Need for an initial DD is set to Yes then the KYD DD Oversight Status must be Completed
